guidelines: Organize settings into logical categories with sidebar navigation
Use appropriate controls: toggles for on/off, selects for options
Show current values and provide immediate feedback on changes
Include a save/apply mechanism with confirmation
colorGuidance: Use brand accent sparingly for active navigation items
commonMistakes: No search or filter for large settings pages
Unclear which settings have been modified
Destructive actions too easy to trigger accidentally
No confirmation before saving critical changes
qualityChecklist: Each setting has a clear label and description
Changes can be saved or discarded
